explanation: I entered the applicant name to start the service journey.
The name is complete, so I am moving to the updates question.
I selected email updates, which reveals the email-address field.
I entered the email address for the initial review state.
The initial answers are complete, so I am moving to the check-answers page.
I followed the change link for the full name so I can update that earlier answer.
I replaced the earlier name with the corrected value.
The updated name is entered, so I am moving back through the remaining question.
The later answer is still present, so I am returning to the review page to confirm the summary updated.

action.summary: I changed the full name from the check-answers flow and confirmed the summary now shows the updated value.

explanation: The check-answers page now shows the corrected name, so I am ending the task.
